text:
There once was a little orphan cat named Thudger. Thudger lived in a big old house all by himself. He loved to roam around outside getting into all sorts of mischief. One day, while wandering around, he accidentally fell into a big shiny fish pond. Poor kitty lay there feeling sorry for himself. Suddenly, a little old lady appeared out of nowhere.

"The cute little kitty would make a fine addition to my grandpa's pond," she said. "Would you like to come live with me?" Thudger curled up into a ball and nuzzled her warm coat.

The lady was such a good caretaker that she'd toss him fish to snack on. Sometimes she'd even bake him a little cobblestone cake! Thudger decided he could have lots more adventures with this lady. Whenever his old man got tired of complaining about the wildlife munching on his roses, he'd remind him only Thudger got fish for snackies. That just boosted old
